-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
TO RUN ROOT, RUN THIS:

conda activate root-cpp

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

cd Documents/Codes/QED_Test

g++ -I~/miniconda3/envs/root-cpp/include -o Simulation_Program_ROOT_Output PYTHIA_Generate_Events_ROOT.cc -lpythia8 $(root-config --cflags) -L~/miniconda3/envs/root-cpp/lib -std=c++20 $(root-config --glibs)

./Simulation_Program_ROOT_Output

g++ -I/home/user/miniconda3/envs/root-cpp/include -o Simulation_Program_HEPMC_Output PYTHIA_Generate_Events_HEPMC.cc -L/home/user/miniconda3/envs/root-cpp/lib -lHepMC3 -lpythia8 $(root-config --cflags) -std=c++20 $(root-config --glibs)

./Simulation_Program_HEPMC_Output

root -l yourfile.root -e "new TBrowser"

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

IF GITHUB AUTHORIZATION CREDENTALS ARE MISSING RUN THIS:

ssh-add ~/github_ssh_key

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

IF INTERNET CONNECTION IS DOWN AND CAN'T PUSH TO GITHUB RUN THIS:

sudo nmclie networking off
sudo nmclie networking on
